content:
Fiscal Growth Benchmarks

Aoura Group has officially released its audited financial reports for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. Driven by substantial demand in cloud services, international expansion, and digital products, the group reports consolidated revenues of $3.2 Billion, representing a 28% year-over-year increase.

Key Performance Metrics

Our operational performance across key divisions demonstrated unprecedented resilient growth:

  • Aoura Services: Reached $1.8B in revenue, led by cloud database infrastructure.
  • Aoura Products: Contributed $1.4B, boosted by the launch of premium consumer accessories.
  • Operating Margin: Improved to 22.4%, up 150 basis points due to optimized cloud delivery costs.
"Our strategic focus on operational discipline and expansion into high-growth markets has yielded exceptional results for our shareholders."

2026 Forward-Looking Guidance

For the upcoming fiscal year, Aoura Group expects double-digit growth to persist, projecting total revenues between $3.6B and $3.8B. Detailed documentation is available on the Investor Relations dashboard.
